overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during a light rain shower. The player moves along wet sidewalks lined with modern glass buildings and palm trees, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and vending machines, eventually approaching a busy intersection with tram tracks and digital billboards.

tall palm trees lining the street median

rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the surroundings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy futuristic city street, walking along a covered sidewalk beside a modern glass building. Palm trees line the center of the street while pedestrians with umbrellas walk toward the camera. The wet pavement reflects the cool, diffused light of the overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: Walking past a seating area with white marble benches and planters, the camera briefly tilts up to admire the towering glass skyscrapers above. A person sits on the bench to the left as the covered walkway continues alongside the modern building facade.

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up to a transit area featuring tram tracks embedded in the wet street. The camera passes a prominent red vending kiosk with digital advertisements on the right, while the view ahead reveals a busy intersection with more futuristic architecture and additional vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with digital billboards and elevated skybridges

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with towering digital billboards and an elevated skybridge overhead. The camera approaches the crosswalk where vehicles wait at the traffic light, then moves through the intersection as cars begin to pass through the rain-slicked streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rainy futuristic sidewalk that gradually opens into a sprawling, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by moving past a modern glass building and palm trees, where the wet pavement reflects the cool, diffused light of an overcast sky as pedestrians with umbrellas pass by. As the camera glides past white marble benches and planters, it briefly tilts upward to take in the scale of the towering skyscrapers before returning to the path of the covered walkway. The scene then expands into a transit area, passing a red digital vending kiosk and embedded tram tracks that lead toward a busier district. Finally, the view opens wide into a massive intersection dominated by elevated skybridges and towering digital billboards, moving through the crosswalk as vehicles navigate the rain-slicked streets.
